query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "memslides: a hierarchical memory driven agent framework for personaliz" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) by investigating the mechanistic dynamics of how language models acquire and retain factual knowledge (parametric memory), which is the core biological/algorithmic mechanism underlying the "memory" and "personalization" aspects of the user's query regarding LLM agents.
